name: Chocolate Fondue
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup thickened cream, (5 fl oz) (double or heavy cream)
250 grams dark chocolate (8 oz), broken into pieces
Chopped selection of fresh fruits (e.g., strawberries, grapes, pineapple, mandarin oranges, or orange segments)
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently heat glucose, thickened cream, and liqueur in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Stir until the mixture boils.
3. Remove from heat and add the dark chocolate pieces.
4. Stir until all ingredients are combined.
5. Serve immediately with a selection of marinated fresh fruits.
Note: Dark chocolate can be replaced with white or milk chocolate for this recipe. Alternatively, you can create one mixture using all three types of chocolate by pouring them into a dish and allowing the colors to mix, forming a marbled appearance.
